name: HEALTHY CHOICE WELLNESS CORP.
summary: PART I . Healthy Choice Wellness Corp. (the Company or HCWC or we or our or us) is a holding company focused on providing consumers with healthier daily choices with respect to nutrition and other lifestyle alternatives. Through its wholly owned subsidiaries, the Company operates: Healthy Choice Markets, Inc.
